_comment: Audit Template Configuration — fill in all required fields, then run /setup-audit. Fields ending in _comment are documentation only and are stripped at runtime.

company._comment: Company identity — used in headings, meta tags, email copy, and report footers.

domain._comment: URLs — siteUrl is required. reportBaseUrl and corsOrigin are derived from siteUrl automatically if left empty.

branding._comment: Brand colors must be valid CSS hex values (3 or 6 digits). logoUrl can be a relative path from /public or a full URL.

contact._comment: Primary contact details shown in the footer and email templates. Only email is required; all other fields are optional. mapsEmbedUrl must be a Google Maps embed URL.

team._comment: Add one object per team member. At least one entry is required. calendarUrl accepts any booking link (cal.com, Calendly, etc.).

social._comment: All social links are optional. Provide full URLs including https://.

notifications._comment: Email notification settings. recipients receives a copy of every new lead. fromEmail must be a sender address verified in your Resend account.

analytics._comment: Tracking IDs — omit or leave blank any service you do not use. Analytics tags are only rendered when the ID is non-empty.

seo._comment: Structured-data enhancements. All fields are optional.

auditForm._comment: Audit form configuration. painPoints and tools default to the built-in lists when omitted.

llm._comment: LLM provider settings. Defaults are production-ready; only override if you need specific models or limits.

prompt._comment: System-prompt customisation. All fields are optional. customInstructions is appended to the system prompt and sanitised for prompt injection.

search._comment: Web-search query configuration. maxQueries controls the total query budget (1–12).

email._comment: Transactional email copy overrides. All fields are optional — defaults come from the email templates.
